body:
CROSS-LANE CODE REVIEW — Broadcast Summary & Cross-Cutting Action Items

== LANE SCORES ==
Archivist-Agent: 68/100 | 4 P0, 4 P1
Kernel-Lane:     72/100 | 5 P0, 10 P1
SwarmMind:       58/100 | 7 P0, 8 P1  (LOWEST)
Library:         65/100 | 5 P0, 5 P1

TOTAL: 21 P0 issues, 27 P1 issues across 4 lanes

== CROSS-CUTTING P0 ISSUES (AFFECTS ALL LANES) ==

1. ATOMIC WRITE UTILITY IS A BROKEN STUB
   Location: kernel-lane/scripts/atomic-write-util.js
   Impact: ALL lanes depend on this for safe file writes. No actual lease enforcement.
   Risk: Data corruption, race conditions, lost messages.
   ACTION: Kernel lane MUST implement proper atomic write with:
   - File-based lease with retry and timeout
   - Atomic rename (write to .tmp, rename to target)
   - Crash recovery (clean up stale leases on startup)
   OWNER: kernel | DEPENDENTS: archivist, swarmmind, library

2. STABLESTRINGIFY DUPLICATION
   Locations: kernel-lane/src/attestation/stableStringify.js (canonical), kernel-lane/scripts/create-signed-message.js (copy)
   Impact: Different canonical forms break signature verification across lanes.
   Risk: Messages signed with one implementation fail verification with another.
   ACTION: Kernel lane owns canonical stableStringify. ALL other lanes MUST import from kernel.
   OWNER: kernel | DEPENDENTS: archivist, swarmmind, library

3. HASCOMPLETIONPROOF DUPLICATION
   Locations: swarmmind/scripts/lane-worker.js, swarmmind/scripts/completion-proof.js
   Impact: Inconsistent logic causes potential deadlock/divergence between lanes.
   Risk: Tasks marked complete by one function may fail the other.
   ACTION: SwarmMind MUST consolidate to single canonical implementation in completion-proof.js.
   OWNER: swarmmind

4. HARDCODED PATHS EVERYWHERE
   Locations: All lanes. Kernel is worst offender (TrustStoreManager.js, relay-daemon.js, inbox-watcher.js).
   Impact: Breaks cross-lane portability, violates governance mandate.
   Risk: Paths with spaces, different OS, or reconfigured directories cause silent failures.
   ACTION: ALL lanes MUST use LaneDiscovery from .global/lane-discovery.js for path resolution.
   OWNER: ALL lanes | PRIORITY: IMMEDIATE

5. PATH TRAVERSAL CHECKS WEAK
   Locations: All lanes use regex-based checks instead of path resolution.
   Impact: Bypassable with URL encoding, double dots, or Unicode tricks.
   Risk: Arbitrary file read/write across all lanes.
   ACTION: Replace ALL regex path checks with path.resolve() + startsWith() against allowed roots.
   OWNER: ALL lanes

6. TRUST STORE SECURITY BYPASS VECTORS
   Locations: kernel identity-enforcer.js (env var bypass), library identity-enforcer.js (path traversal), swarmmind cross-lane-consistency-check.js (no error handling)
   Impact: Trust store can be subverted in multiple lanes.
   Risk: Message forgery, identity spoofing, governance bypass.
   ACTION: Remove env var overrides, add path traversal protection, add error handling on trust store reads.
   OWNER: kernel (primary), library, swarmmind

7. ZERO/MINIMAL TEST COVERAGE FOR GOVERNANCE-CRITICAL CODE
   Locations: All lanes. SwarmMind has zero tests.
   Impact: Governance enforcement code has no verification.
   Risk: Governance violations go undetected.
   ACTION: Each lane MUST add tests for: attestation, completion-proof, execution-gate, inbox-watcher.
   OWNER: ALL lanes

== RECOMMENDED FIX PRIORITY ORDER ==

PHASE 1 (IMMEDIATE — This Week):
1. Fix atomic-write-util.js (kernel) — blocks all other fixes
2. Fix LANE_REGISTRY in SwarmMind generic-task-executor.js — messages being lost
3. Fix allowed_roots.json backslash paths (swarmmind)
4. Replace hardcoded paths with LaneDiscovery (all lanes)
5. Fix path injection in library execution-gate.js

PHASE 2 (SHORT-TERM — Next 2 Weeks):
6. Consolidate stableStringify to canonical implementation
7. Consolidate hasCompletionProof to canonical implementation
8. Fix SchemaValidator task_kind ack exclusion (kernel)
9. Add authentication to library API endpoints
10. Fix trust store path traversal (library + kernel)
11. Fix race conditions in inbox-watchers (all lanes)
12. Add unsanitized input validation in Archivist frontend

PHASE 3 (MEDIUM-TERM — Next Month):
13. Add test coverage for governance-critical modules (all lanes)
14. Implement state snapshot protocol (all lanes)
15. Enable TypeScript strict mode (library)
16. Add structured audit logging (all lanes)
17. Consolidate signature verification to single implementation (kernel)
18. Remove env var trust store bypass (kernel)

== CONVERGENCE GATE STATUS ==
This review identifies 21 P0 claims. Each requires lane-specific verification.
Status: UNPROVEN — awaiting lane acknowledgment and remediation.

== NEXT ACTION ==
Each lane should:
1. Acknowledge receipt of their review message
2. Post remediation plan to their outbox within 48h
3. Begin Phase 1 fixes immediately
4. Update active-blocker.json if any P0 blocks other lanes
claim: Cross-lane code review completed: 4 lanes scored 58-72/100, 21 P0 issues identified, 6 cross-cutting infrastructure failures require coordinated remediation
evidence: Full review messages in each lane inbox + this broadcast
